author: Mary Crawford
title: Perfect for church
body: Fits down the church aisle and I can raise the seat to see over the pew in front. Small things that matter.

author: Marcia Campbell
title: Wish I'd bought one sooner
body: Spent three years with an uncomfortable powerchair before discovering the M4. What a difference. Don't hesitate — just buy one.

author: Ernest Boothroyd
title: Five stars isn't enough
body: If I could give six stars I would. The M4 has given me back my independence, my social life, and my dignity. I cannot recommend it highly enough.

author: Mei Chen
title: Lovely smooth ride
body: The ride quality is wonderful. Smooth, quiet, and comfortable. It feels like gliding rather than rolling. Makes every journey a pleasure rather than an ordeal.

author: Bernard Kelley
title: Workshop access
body: I have a small woodworking workshop and the M4 lets me move between benches easily. Sideways movement is key.

author: Priya Sharma
title: Love the indicator lights
body: The LED lights on the M4 are a nice touch. They make me visible in the dark winter evenings which is important for safety. Thoughtful design detail.

author: Donald Featherstone
title: Outstanding in every way
body: I've owned the M4 for nearly a year now. It's been completely reliable, endlessly comfortable, and has given me freedom I didn't think was possible.

author: Wilfred Hill
title: Fits through standard doorways
body: The M4 is narrow enough to fit through all the standard doorways in my house. No modifications needed to my home which saved a lot of money and hassle.

author: Daphne Mercer
title: So well designed
body: Every feature has clearly been thought through. From the joystick position to the folding mechanism to the wheel design. It all just works together perfectly.

author: Sylvia Dawson
title: Recommended by my OT
body: My occupational therapist recommended the M4 and I'm so glad she did. It's perfectly suited to my needs and the adjustable features mean it fits me like a glove.

author: Basil Gordon
title: Perfect for the pub
body: I can finally get to the local pub again! The M4 fits through the doorway and tucks neatly under the table. My mates are well impressed with it too.

author: Lorraine Harvey
title: Market day favourite
body: I go to the local market every Saturday now. The stallholders all know me and my M4. It is wonderful.

author: Harold Newman
title: Pub test passed
body: If it can navigate a busy pub on a Friday night it can handle anything. And it does. Brilliantly.

author: Constance Illingworth
title: Elegant and functional
body: The M4 manages to be both stylish and incredibly functional. It doesn't scream "medical equipment" which I really appreciate.

author: Clifford Heap
title: Brilliant on slopes
body: We live in Sheffield so hills are unavoidable. The M4 handles steep inclines and declines effortlessly. The self-balancing keeps me perfectly level throughout.

author: David Thompson
title: Brilliant engineering
body: As an engineer myself, I am thoroughly impressed by the build quality. The mecanum wheels are genius — I can navigate tight spaces in my kitchen effortlessly.

author: Iris Peterson
title: Easy on the hands
body: The joystick is very gentle on arthritic hands. Barely any pressure needed. Very well thought out.

author: Vera Sanders
title: Comfortable armrests
body: The padded armrests are lovely. Soft enough to be comfortable but firm enough to support me when I'm getting in and out of the chair.

author: Edwin Webb
title: Stairs are the only limit
body: Does everything I need except stairs, which is fair enough. For everything else it is absolutely perfect.

author: Valerie Hudson
title: Comfortable all day
body: I spend most of my day in the M4 and never get uncomfortable. The seat cushion is supportive and the armrests are at just the right height. Really well designed.

author: Brian Murgatroyd
title: Fantastic on all terrain
body: Took the M4 to a muddy country park last weekend. Handled the terrain without any issues at all. The wheels grip incredibly well.

author: Constance Wood
title: Daughter bought it for me
body: My daughter researched wheelchairs for months and settled on the M4. She made an excellent choice. It's everything she promised and more.

author: Brenda Forsyth
title: Amazed by the quality
body: Having used NHS wheelchairs for years, the M4 is in a completely different league. The comfort, the manoeuvrability, the battery — everything is superior.

author: Frank Bottomley
title: Arrived damaged, long wait for replacement
body: The chair arrived with a cracked wheel hub and the joystick was loose. Replacement took 3 weeks. When it finally came it worked but I'd already bought an alternative. Very frustrating experience overall. The returns process was fine at least.

author: Albert Green
title: Grandson loves riding along
body: My 4-year-old grandson thinks grandad has the coolest chair ever. Makes our walks to the park so much fun.

author: Daphne Holt
title: Gentle on joints
body: The ride is so smooth it does not aggravate my arthritis at all. Much gentler than my previous power chair.

author: Graham Scott
title: Impressive technology
body: The gyroscope technology is genuinely impressive. Going over kerb ramps that used to terrify me is now effortless.

author: Audrey Campbell
title: Fantastic dealer support
body: Our local dealer was wonderful. They helped with the setup, adjusted everything to my size, and even did a follow-up visit to check I was happy. Great service.

author: Agnes Hopkinson
title: A real game changer
body: The M4 has changed what's possible for me. Rough paths, grass, slopes — nothing stops it. I feel confident going anywhere now.

author: Edna Walsh
title: Took a while to get used to
body: Coming from a manual wheelchair the transition was harder than expected. The self-balancing felt strange at first and I needed a good week to feel confident. Now I wouldn't go back — it's a brilliant chair. Just be prepared for an adjustment period.

author: Victor Price
title: Handles rain well
body: I got caught in a downpour last week and the M4 was absolutely fine. The electronics are well-protected and everything worked perfectly even when wet.

author: Arthur Bentley
title: Transformed our daily routine
body: Getting my wife in and out of the house used to be a 20-minute ordeal. With the M4 she's out the door in seconds. It's changed our whole routine.

author: Oscar Hayes
title: Train travel friendly
body: The wheelchair spaces on trains accommodate the M4 perfectly. Guard even commented on how neat it is.

author: Keith Barton
title: Allotment accessible
body: I can get to my allotment again. The M4 handles the slightly rough paths to my plot. Growing veg again!

author: Herbert York
title: Impressed at the mobility show
body: Tried it at Naidex in Birmingham. Was so impressed I ordered one on the spot. No regrets.

author: William Earnshaw
title: Top marks all round
body: Comfort: 5/5. Manoeuvrability: 5/5. Battery: 5/5. Build quality: 5/5. Value: 5/5. What more can I say? It's brilliant.

author: Theresa Dawson
title: Rainy day tested
body: Used it through a proper British downpour. Electronics were fine, wheels gripped well. No complaints.

author: Nigel Wood
title: Stylish design
body: Actually looks modern and sleek unlike most medical equipment. People comment on how nice it looks all the time.

author: Wendy Pratt
title: Handles beautifully
body: The steering is so responsive and precise. I can navigate through crowded places without any anxiety. The mecanum wheels make such a difference.

author: Olive Jennings
title: Sunday roast at the pub
body: I go for Sunday roast at the local pub again. The M4 fits at the table and I can raise the seat to match everyone.

author: Vivian Ainsworth
title: Perfect Christmas present
body: My family bought me the M4 for Christmas and it's honestly the best present I've ever received. Life-changing is not an exaggeration.

author: Vernon Gill
title: So much independence
body: Before the M4 I relied on my carer for everything. Now I can go to the shops, make a cuppa, and move around the house completely independently. Priceless.

author: Dorothy Hughes
title: My husband loves it
body: Bought this for my husband who has MS. He says it's the most comfortable chair he's ever used. The footrests are adjustable which really helps with his leg positioning.

author: Norman Blake
title: Reliable daily driver
body: Use it every day for the school run with my grandchildren. Never let me down once in 5 months.

author: Clifford Holmes
title: Works well on carpets
body: My house has thick carpets throughout and the M4 handles them perfectly. Previous chairs used to struggle but this one glides over them without any issues.

author: Prudence Walsh
title: Occupational therapist approved
body: My OT assessed the M4 and gave it full approval. She was particularly impressed with the postural support and the easy-to-use controls. Professional endorsement.

author: Tina Hollingworth
title: Highly recommend
body: If you're considering the M4, just buy it. You won't regret it. It's everything they say it is and more. Five stars all day long.

author: Kathleen Forbes
title: Lovely colour options
body: I chose the black M4 and it looks very smart. Nice to have a choice rather than the usual clinical white that most medical equipment comes in.

author: Enid Fitzgerald
title: Gentle on my joints
body: The smooth acceleration is gentle on my arthritic joints. No sudden jolts or jerky movements. The M4 moves exactly how you want it to, every time.

author: Stanley Wright
title: Good for hospital visits
body: I have regular hospital appointments and the M4 makes getting around those huge buildings so much easier. The sideways movement is particularly useful in lifts and corridors.

author: Patrick Hardy
title: Football matches again
body: Went to Anfield last month. First match in 3 years. The M4 handled the crowds and ramps perfectly.

author: Ursula Fenton
title: Better than expected
body: I had high expectations after reading other reviews and somehow the M4 still exceeded them. The self-balancing in particular is remarkable.

author: Brian Oldham
title: Good but pricey accessories
body: The base chair is good value, especially with VAT relief. But the accessories are quite expensive - the headrest, side guards, etc. add up quickly. The chair works fine without them but feels incomplete. Budget for the extras.

author: Victor Pearce
title: Wish the footrest was wider
body: Excellent chair in every way. Only tiny suggestion would be a slightly wider footrest. Otherwise absolutely perfect.

author: Andrew Prescott
title: Nearly perfect
body: Had my M4 for 6 months now. It's been incredibly reliable and the build quality is outstanding. The armrests could be slightly wider for my frame but it's a minor issue. Would still recommend to anyone.

author: Stanley Waterhouse
title: Brilliant gift for Dad
body: We bought the M4 for Dad's 75th birthday. He's absolutely over the moon with it. Says it makes him feel 20 years younger.

author: Frederick Taylor
title: Handles well in snow
body: We had snow last winter and the M4 coped remarkably well. The mecanum wheels gripped the gritted paths and I could still get to the shops. Impressive.

author: Reginald Patel
title: Smooth on all surfaces
body: Whether it's carpet, tile, tarmac or paving - the M4 handles everything smoothly. No jerking or juddering that I experienced with cheaper chairs.

author: Thelma Rigg
title: My favourite Christmas present
body: My children clubbed together to buy me the M4 for Christmas. It's the most thoughtful gift I've ever received and I use it every single day.

author: Dorothy Yates
title: Struggled to get it upstairs
body: The chair is lovely to use and my husband is very happy with it. Two stars only because we live in a first-floor flat with no lift. Getting 35kg up the stairs is impossible for us so we have to leave it in the communal hallway which isn't ideal. Not really the chair's fault but worth considering.

author: Linda Chapman
title: My independence restored
body: After my accident, I lost a lot of independence. The M4 has given so much of that back. I can go where I want, when I want. Cannot recommend enough.

author: Zoe Mitchell
title: University campus champion
body: I am a student at Leeds and the M4 gets me between lectures easily. It folds down neatly so it doesn't take up much space in the lecture hall.

author: Timothy Moss
title: Park life
body: Regent Park every Sunday morning. Coffee in hand, newspaper in the side bag. The M4 makes it all possible.

author: Rose Battersby
title: Amazed daily
body: Even after four months I'm still amazed by the M4. The technology, the comfort, the freedom it gives me. Best purchase I've ever made.

author: Brenda Holmes
title: Comfortable headrest option
body: Added the headrest accessory and it makes long outings so much more comfortable. Great optional extra.

author: Kathleen Barnes
title: Smooth ride quality
body: The suspension soaks up bumps really well. Even on uneven pavements, the ride is smooth and comfortable. My old wheelchair used to jar my back something terrible.

author: Doreen Sharp
title: Wedding guest star
body: Went to my granddaughter wedding. Everyone commented on how smart the chair looked. Felt wonderful.

author: Sarah Blackwood
title: Mum loves it, learning curve though
body: Bought for my 78-year-old mum. She adores it now but the first week was tricky - the controls are quite different from her old powerchair. The XSTO team were helpful with phone support. Battery lasts her about 3 days between charges.

author: Philip Harwood
title: Superbly comfortable
body: The seating position and cushioning on the M4 are superb. I can sit in it all day without any discomfort. Makes such a difference.

author: Owen Watts
title: Pub quiz champion again
body: Back at the pub quiz every Thursday. The M4 fits perfectly at our usual table. Team is complete again.

author: Ian Thompson
title: Incredible value
body: Compared to similar self-balancing chairs from other brands, the M4 is exceptional value. Features you would expect to pay double for.

author: Horace Martin
title: Bought after trying at dealer
body: I tried the M4 at a dealer demo day and was sold within five minutes. The sideways movement alone was enough to convince me. Three months on, no regrets.

author: Arthur Gray
title: Took it to Cornwall
body: Navigated the cobblestones in St Ives without any bother. Even managed some of the harbour paths.

author: Sidney Platt
title: Outstanding product
body: From ordering to delivery to daily use, everything has been first class. The M4 is a premium product and you can tell. Worth every pound.

author: Phyllis Duncan
title: Comfortable armrests
body: The armrests are at a perfect height and angle. No shoulder strain like I had with my old chair.

author: Olive Stansfield
title: Couldn't be happier
body: The M4 has exceeded every expectation we had. It's comfortable, easy to use, and handles every situation we've encountered. Absolutely delighted.

author: Clive Henderson
title: Low maintenance
body: Apart from charging the battery, the M4 needs virtually no maintenance. No tyres to pump up, no chains to oil. Just charge and go. Brilliantly simple.

author: Anne Williams
title: Wish I found this sooner
body: Been through 4 different wheelchairs over the years. This is by far the best. The omnidirectional wheels are a game changer in supermarkets.

author: Wendy Clarke
title: Comfortable and reliable
body: My husband uses this daily and it's been brilliant for his independence. The folding mechanism is clever but does require a bit of strength. We'd have liked a slightly bigger seat cushion for longer journeys. Otherwise very happy.

author: Hazel Martin
title: Comfortable seat cushion
body: The seat is genuinely comfortable for long periods. I do not get the aches I used to with my old chair.

author: Karen Yates
title: After-sales support excellent
body: Had a minor query about the controller settings. XSTO support sorted it via video call in 10 minutes.

author: Walter King
title: Excellent after-sales
body: Had a question about battery care and XSTO responded the same day with detailed advice. Great after-sales support which gives me confidence in the brand.

author: Rosemary Oakes
title: Perfect for our caravan holidays
body: The M4 folds small enough to fit in our caravan storage. We've taken it to three caravan parks now and it handles grass and gravel pitches perfectly.

author: Rita Stevens
title: Wheelchair dance partner
body: I do wheelchair dancing and the omnidirectional movement is perfect for it. My instructor is amazed.

author: Muriel Thomas
title: Better than expected battery
body: The battery range exceeded what was advertised. I'm regularly getting more than the stated range which is a pleasant surprise. Usually it's the other way round!

author: Jeffrey Todd
title: Solid tyres are great
body: No punctures to worry about. The solid tyres still give a comfortable ride. One less thing to maintain.

author: Neville Broadbent
title: Money well spent
body: The M4 isn't cheap but it's absolutely worth it. The quality, performance, and reliability justify every penny. You get what you pay for.

author: Gerald Barker
title: Fits in a taxi
body: Folds small enough to go in a black cab boot. Makes getting around London so much easier.

author: Audrey Chapman
title: Hotel friendly
body: Took it to a hotel in Edinburgh. Fit through the room door, bathroom door, everywhere. Very travel-friendly.

author: Quentin Forbes
title: Smooth as silk
body: The motor response is incredibly smooth. No jerky starts or sudden stops. It feels like gliding. Best powerchair I've ever used by a mile.

author: Beryl Ward
title: Good for museum visits
body: I love visiting museums and galleries. The M4's precise controls and quiet operation make it perfect for indoor cultural spaces. No more missing out!

author: Vincent Page
title: Cruise ship ready
body: Taking it on a Mediterranean cruise next month. The airline-approved battery makes travel stress-free.

author: Derek Simmons
title: Very good but delivery was slow
body: The chair exceeded expectations in terms of build quality and comfort. However, delivery took nearly 4 weeks which was frustrating as we were told 2 weeks. Once it arrived though, absolutely no complaints about the product itself.

author: Victor Lane
title: Great turning circle
body: Can turn completely around in my small bathroom. The turning circle is incredibly tight. Really practical.

author: Mabel Uttley
title: Incredible manoeuvrability
body: The way the M4 can move in any direction is amazing. Getting into lifts, navigating corridors, parking at desks — it handles everything perfectly.

author: Diana Stewart
title: Easy battery swap
body: The battery pops out easily for charging. I bought a spare so I always have one ready. Brilliant design.

author: Pauline Radcliffe
title: Brilliant in the rain
body: I was nervous about using it in wet weather but the M4 handles rain perfectly. The wheels grip well on wet surfaces and the electrics are well-protected.

author: Walter Reeves
title: Snowy conditions handled
body: We had light snow in January and the M4 coped admirably. The wheels gripped well on slippery surfaces.

author: Archibald Duncan
title: Great for attending football
body: I have a wheelchair space at my local football ground. The M4 gets me there and back comfortably. Even handles the crowds well with its nimble movement.

author: Diane Foster
title: Very good value with VAT relief
body: With the VAT exemption this represents exceptional value. The chair is well-built and the self-balancing is genuinely useful on slopes. I'd have appreciated clearer setup instructions though - took us a while to figure out all the settings.

author: Jean Stevens
title: Comfortable headrest
body: The headrest support is just right. I have neck problems and the M4's headrest keeps me comfortable even on longer outings. Very well padded.

author: Craig Webster
title: Photography outings
body: I am an amateur photographer and the M4 lets me get to locations I had given up on. Brilliant for outdoor hobbies.

author: Leslie Horsfall
title: Perfect for our needs
body: My wife and I spent months comparing wheelchairs. The M4 ticked every single box. Six months later we're still completely satisfied.

author: Desmond White
title: Easy assembly
body: The M4 arrived mostly assembled. Just had to attach the footrests and charge the battery. Was up and running within an hour of delivery.

author: Maureen Sugden
title: Arrived with cosmetic damage
body: The armrest had a deep scratch and one of the footrest covers was cracked on arrival. XSTO sent replacements but it took nearly 3 weeks. For the price you expect it to arrive in perfect condition. Chair works fine but the experience left a sour taste.

author: Martin Shaw
title: Handles rain well
body: Got caught in a downpour in Birmingham city centre. Chair handled it perfectly. No issues whatsoever.

author: Oscar Pemberton
title: Red Dot Award well deserved
body: When I saw the M4 won a Red Dot Design Award I understood why. The engineering and design are genuinely world-class. Proud to own one.

author: Terence Brown
title: Impressed physiotherapist
body: My physiotherapist was really impressed with the M4's postural support. She said it's one of the best she's seen for maintaining good sitting posture.

author: Sandra Mitchell
title: Love the chair, delivery was a nightmare
body: The M4 itself is superb — handles every surface we've tried it on. But the delivery experience was awful. Courier left it in the rain, the box was soaked through and we had to dry everything out. Thankfully no damage to the chair but it shouldn't happen with a product this expensive.

author: Peter Ainsworth
title: Too heavy for my car
body: The chair is excellent in every way — smooth, comfortable, great battery life. But I drive a small hatchback and at 35kg I physically cannot load it myself. I need someone to help every time. If you have a bigger vehicle or a ramp it would be perfect. Three stars for the weight issue only.

author: Susan Baker
title: Perfect for city living
body: Living in central Manchester, space is tight. The M4 navigates narrow pavements and shop aisles brilliantly.

author: Kathleen Ackroyd
title: A joy to use
body: Every morning I look forward to getting in my M4. It's comfortable, responsive, and makes everything easier. A genuine joy to use.

author: Phyllis Anderson
title: Confident going out alone
body: For the first time in years, I feel confident going out on my own. The M4 is reliable, easy to use, and gets me where I need to go safely. Life-changing.

author: Norma Stanton
title: Can't fault it
body: We've tried to find something to complain about and honestly can't. The M4 does everything it promises and more. Highly recommend to anyone.

author: June Hartley
title: Waited over a month for delivery
body: Ordered in September and didn't receive it until late October. Five weeks is far too long when you're depending on a wheelchair. The chair is decent but the wait was unacceptable. Communication during the delay was poor too.

author: Francis Underwood
title: Bowling club favourite
body: I am back at the bowling club and the M4 handles the green edges perfectly. My team missed me!

author: Trevor Palmer
title: Slight learning curve but worth it
body: Took me a couple of days to get fully comfortable with all the features but once I did, absolutely brilliant. The omnidirectional movement is amazing.

author: James Whiteley
title: Brilliant customer support
body: Had a question about the settings and the XSTO team responded within an hour with a detailed helpful answer. Product and service both excellent.

author: Carol Spencer
title: Incredible manoeuvrability
body: Can literally move in any direction. Sideways into a parking space, spinning to face friends. It is remarkable.

author: Janet Cooper
title: Happy with purchase overall
body: The M4 does everything it claims. Self-balancing works perfectly, battery is good, and it folds fairly compactly. Only negative is that the seat gets a bit warm after sitting for 3-4 hours. Otherwise brilliant.

author: Katherine Dean
title: Neighbours are jealous
body: Three of my neighbours with mobility issues have asked where I got it. Think I might start earning commission!

author: Patricia Wainwright
title: Everything we hoped for
body: The M4 delivered on every promise. Comfortable, manoeuvrable, great battery, easy to fold. It's everything we hoped for and more.

author: Maurice Ridley
title: Excellent build quality
body: Eight months of daily use and not a scratch or rattle. The M4 is built to last. Every component feels robust and well-made.

author: Brian Carter
title: Transforms daily life
body: Going to the pub with my mates again. Sounds simple but it means the world. The M4 gave me my social life back.

author: Ivy Schofield
title: Recommended to my support group
body: I've told everyone in my disability support group about the M4. Two members have already ordered one. It really is that good.

author: Lynne Ashton
title: Gave mum her confidence back
body: Mum had a bad fall from her old chair and was terrified of using one again. The M4's stability and self-balancing gave her confidence back within days.

author: Olive Watson
title: Easy to clean
body: The surfaces wipe down easily. Important when you use it every day. Very practical design.

author: Cyril Long
title: Simple controls
body: I'm not good with technology but the M4 controls are dead simple. Joystick forward to go, back to reverse. Even the speed adjustment is straightforward.

author: Gordon Lee
title: Best on the market
body: Researched for months. Tried 5 different chairs at mobility shows. The M4 won hands down.

author: Herbert Ramsbottom
title: Exceptional product
body: Everything about the M4 is exceptional. The ride quality, the battery life, the build. It's clear that XSTO understand what wheelchair users actually need.

author: Alexander Black
title: Exceeded all expectations
body: Did not think a wheelchair could make me smile but the first time I used the self-balancing I genuinely grinned.

author: Nora Williams
title: Lovely seat cushion
body: The seat cushion is memory foam and it's wonderfully comfortable. I can sit in it for hours without any pressure sores developing. Much better than my previous chair.

author: Frank Morris
title: Handles slopes brilliantly
body: We live on a hill in Sheffield and I was worried about slopes. The M4 handles them with absolute ease. Self-balancing is brilliant.

author: Dorothy Price
title: Safe and sturdy
body: I have cerebral palsy and the self-balancing technology makes me feel completely secure. Never had a wobble or scare.

author: Irene Rogers
title: My daughter recommended it
body: My daughter found XSTO online and I am so glad she did. This chair has given me a new lease of life at 82.

author: Leslie Archer
title: Caravan holiday success
body: Took it on a caravan holiday to Wales. Handled the campsite paths and local village beautifully.

author: Herbert Mason
title: Bought two - one for each house
body: I liked the M4 so much for my main home that I bought a second one for my holiday cottage. That should tell you everything about how good it is.

author: Kenneth Ingham
title: Perfect for pub trips
body: The lads couldn't believe how well the M4 handled the pub doorway and tight spaces around the tables. First time I've been able to sit WITH them rather than at the end.

author: Carol Henderson
title: Smooth and responsive
body: The joystick controls are so intuitive. I was worried about learning to use a powered wheelchair but within minutes I felt confident. The turning circle is amazing thanks to those special wheels.

author: Gladys Entwistle
title: Love the folding feature
body: Being able to fold the M4 for car transport is brilliant. It makes day trips and holidays so much easier. A really thoughtful design feature.

author: Maureen Fletcher
title: Took time to adjust
body: I've been using manual wheelchairs for 20 years and the switch to the M4 was harder than expected. The controls are very different and the self-balancing felt unsettling at first. Two months in, I'm getting used to it, but it's not instant.

author: Cedric Palmer
title: Works well in the workshop
body: I still tinker in my workshop and the M4 lets me move around the bench and tools easily. The sideways movement is perfect for getting close to the workbench.

author: Arthur Coleman
title: Modern and stylish
body: I didn't want a wheelchair that looked medical and depressing. The M4 looks modern and sleek. I actually get compliments on it which is a nice change!

author: Edith Marshall
title: Changed my mums life
body: Bought this for mum who is 85. She has not stopped smiling since. Goes out every day now instead of staying in.

author: Lesley Dunn
title: Control panel is intuitive
body: The LCD display shows everything clearly. Speed, battery, mode. Very user-friendly interface.

author: Albert Morgan
title: Quick delivery
body: Ordered on the Monday and it arrived by Thursday. Very quick for such a large item. It came well-packaged and was easy to assemble.

author: Joan Templeton
title: So easy to use
body: I was worried the technology would be complicated but the M4 is incredibly intuitive. I was confident using it within the first afternoon.

author: Sheila Hunt
title: Wonderful purchase
body: Cannot praise this enough. Every feature works exactly as described. Genuinely life-changing technology.

author: Frederick Gartside
title: Solid as a rock
body: The stability of the M4 is incredible. Even on uneven ground I feel completely safe and secure. The self-balancing is genuinely remarkable.

author: Barbara Wright
title: Freedom to travel
body: Took it on holiday to the Lake District. Handled the paths around Windermere beautifully. Even managed some light gravel.

author: Derek Turner
title: Replaced my scooter
body: Sold my mobility scooter and got this instead. Much more manoeuvrable and the seat elevation is something scooters cannot do.

author: Ivan Sutcliffe
title: Worth saving up for
body: We saved for six months to buy the M4 and it was absolutely worth the wait. The quality and performance are head and shoulders above anything else we looked at.

author: Olive Richardson
title: Attractive design
body: I chose the M4 partly because of how it looks. It's modern and doesn't scream "disability". I feel good being seen in it which is important for my confidence.

author: Brenda Marshall
title: Perfect for supermarket runs
body: I dreaded going to the supermarket in my old wheelchair. The M4's sideways movement means I can navigate the aisles without bumping into anything. Shopping is enjoyable again!

author: Eleanor Thistlethwaite
title: Best wheelchair on the market
body: I've done extensive research and tried multiple chairs. The M4 is simply the best available. Nothing else comes close for the price.

author: Patricia Wells
title: Impressed with the battery
body: I was sceptical about the battery range claims but they're spot on. I can do a full day out including shopping and visiting without worrying about running out of charge.

author: Norman Cragg
title: Remarkable technology
body: The self-balancing system on the M4 is genuinely remarkable. Going over kerbs and up ramps feels completely natural. Revolutionary design.

author: Joyce Payne
title: Bird watching trips
body: Took it to RSPB Minsmere. Handled the nature reserve paths beautifully. Best birding trip in years.

author: Hazel Butterworth
title: Incredibly smooth ride
body: The suspension on the M4 is excellent. Even on rough pavements the ride is comfortable. My back pain has actually improved since switching from my old chair.

author: Tony Barker
title: Good chair but too heavy for us
body: The M4 is well-made and the self-balancing is impressive. However, at 35kg we simply can't get it in and out of our car. We don't have a WAV so this is a real limitation. If weight isn't an issue for you, it's excellent.

author: Fiona Campbell
title: Physio approved
body: My physiotherapist was really impressed with the ergonomics. Good posture support throughout the day.

author: Dennis Scholfield
title: My OT was impressed
body: My occupational therapist hadn't seen the M4 before and was genuinely impressed. She's now recommending it to other clients.

author: Florence Lee
title: Helped me stay in my own home
body: The council were talking about me moving to sheltered accommodation. The M4 has allowed me to stay in my own home by making it possible to move around independently.

author: Leonard Harris
title: Grandchildren love it
body: My grandchildren think my M4 is the coolest thing ever. They love watching the wheels move in different directions. It's even got the kids interested in engineering!

author: Lionel Stevenson
title: Four stars - wish it was lighter
body: The M4 is excellent in every way except the weight. At my age, lifting it into the car is a challenge. I need help from my son. Otherwise perfect.

author: Nancy Collins
title: Smooth turning
body: The way it turns on the spot is incredible. My old chair needed a 3-point turn in the kitchen. This just spins.

author: George Pickering
title: Superb manoeuvrability
body: I can turn on the spot and move sideways in our kitchen. It makes cooking so much easier. The mecanum wheels are worth their weight in gold.

author: Catherine Rowbotham
title: Excellent for public transport
body: The M4 fits on buses and trains without any issues. The compact size and manoeuvrability make public transport much less stressful.

author: Constance Lowe
title: Tea room accessible
body: My favourite tea room in the Cotswolds has a narrow entrance. The M4 glides through. Cream tea restored!

author: Ivan Mills
title: LED display is clear
body: The controller display is bright and easy to read even in sunlight. Battery level, speed, everything visible.

author: Tina Harding
title: Physiotherapy appointments
body: Getting to physio used to be the hardest part of my week. Now I just hop in the M4 and off I go.

author: Winifred Cox
title: My carer loves it too
body: My carer says it is so much easier to help me now. The folding and unfolding is simple for anyone.

author: Freda Cunningham
title: Beautiful design too
body: Not only does the M4 perform brilliantly, it actually looks good. I've had so many compliments. It doesn't look like a typical wheelchair.

author: Bernard Whittaker
title: Smooth operator
body: The controls are so responsive and smooth. No jerky movements, no sudden stops. It feels like an extension of yourself after a few days.

author: Margaret Thompson
title: Life-changing independence
body: After my stroke last year, I thought my days of getting around independently were over. The M4 has given me back my freedom. The mecanum wheels are incredible - I can navigate my narrow hallway with ease. Worth every penny.

author: Colin Hughes
title: Airline approved battery is key
body: The fact the battery is airline approved was a major selling point. Took it to Spain with no issues at all.

author: Sandra Ellis
title: Great for shopping trips
body: I do my weekly shop independently now. The basket hooks on the back and off I go. Absolutely love it.

author: Peggy Clarke
title: Finally can attend church again
body: My church has narrow aisles and tight corners. The M4 navigates them beautifully. I can attend services again after two years of missing out. God bless XSTO!

author: Eric Woodward
title: Handles grass and gravel perfectly
body: Took the M4 to a country fair last weekend. Grass, gravel, muddy patches — it handled everything. People kept stopping us to ask about it.

author: Maureen Hall
title: So easy to use
body: I am 78 and not tech-savvy at all but I mastered the joystick in minutes. Very intuitive controls.

author: Wanda Cross
title: Highly recommend to anyone
body: If you are considering a power wheelchair, just get this one. You will not regret it. Life changing.

author: Audrey Hargreaves
title: Perfect for supermarket shops
body: I can navigate Tesco aisles, reach items on shelves, and get through the checkout with ease. The M4 has made grocery shopping enjoyable again.

author: Robert Evans
title: Superb quality
body: Had mine for 6 months now. Zero issues. The self-balancing is remarkable going up and down ramps at the local shopping centre.

author: Lucy Mortimer
title: The best on the market
body: After extensive research and multiple demos, the M4 was the clear winner. Nothing else matches it for features, comfort, and value.

author: Marjorie Hall
title: Handles cobblestones
body: I live in a historic town with cobblestone streets. The M4 handles them much better than my previous chair. Still comfortable even on rough surfaces.

author: Gladys Turner
title: Safe and secure feeling
body: I feel very safe in the M4. The braking is responsive and the anti-tip design gives me confidence on slopes. My family were worried but they can see how stable it is.

author: Doreen Knight
title: Husband is so much happier
body: My husband has been in a wheelchair for 4 years and the M4 is the first one he's actually enjoyed using. He goes out voluntarily now which is wonderful to see.

author: Stanley Morris
title: Arrived with a faulty controller
body: Our M4 arrived with a controller that kept disconnecting intermittently. XSTO arranged a replacement part but it took 10 days to arrive. The chair works perfectly now but the initial experience was frustrating. Would have been 5 stars without the hassle.

author: Geoffrey Walsh
title: Well balanced design
body: Never feels tippy even on uneven ground. The centre of gravity is well thought out. Very reassuring.

author: Walter Bottomley
title: Neighbours are jealous
body: Three of my neighbours have now ordered M4s after seeing mine. That tells you everything you need to know about this wheelchair.

author: Douglas Webb
title: Great in the garden too
body: I use my M4 in the garden as well as indoors. It handles grass and paving equally well. Robust little machine that goes everywhere.

author: Raymond Ellis
title: Solid construction
body: As an engineer, I appreciate good design and manufacturing. The M4 is well-engineered with quality materials throughout. Very impressed with the attention to detail.

author: Charles Hemming
title: NHS should prescribe these
body: After comparing the M4 to what the NHS offered, there's simply no comparison. The M4 is years ahead. Worth the investment for anyone who can manage it.

author: Ronald Perry
title: Four stars only because of weight
body: Fantastic wheelchair in every respect except it's a bit heavy for my wife to lift into the car. I need to help her. Otherwise it would be five stars without hesitation.

author: Trevor Newton
title: Reliable and dependable
body: Nine months of daily use and it's still going strong. No breakdowns, no issues. The battery charges quickly and lasts well. Exactly what I needed.

author: Ruby Allen
title: Quiet and smooth
body: The M4 is so quiet you can barely hear it. No annoying motor whine like some chairs. Just smooth, quiet movement. Very civilised.

author: Una Whitworth
title: So comfortable all day
body: I spend 10+ hours in the M4 daily and never get uncomfortable. The seat and backrest are perfectly designed for long-term use.

author: Thomas Young
title: Surprised by the speed
body: Goes faster than I expected. Not dangerously fast but enough to keep up with walking pace easily.

author: Andrew Booth
title: Stable on slopes
body: Live in a hilly area of Bath. The 15-degree slope climbing is accurate. Handles our steep streets perfectly.

author: Gordon Davidson
title: Practical and stylish
body: The M4 strikes the perfect balance between practical functionality and modern styling. It doesn't compromise on either which is rare in mobility equipment.

author: Peggy Lloyd
title: Day trips are back
body: National Trust properties, gardens, seaside towns. We are doing day trips again every weekend. Joy.

author: Betty Chambers
title: Excellent for indoor use
body: Our bungalow has narrow doorways and the M4 navigates them perfectly. The sideways movement means I never bump into door frames anymore.

author: Timothy Greenhalgh
title: Excellent for garden use
body: I'm a keen gardener and the M4 lets me move around the garden on grass, paving, and even bark chip paths. It handles everything.

author: Janet White
title: My GP was impressed
body: Even my doctor commented on how much more mobile I have become since getting the M4. Highly recommended.

author: Raymond Dobson
title: Delivery was a disaster
body: The courier left the box outside in heavy rain for hours. When we opened it the packaging was soaked through. Thankfully the chair was okay but the charger had water damage. Took 2 weeks to get a replacement charger sent. Very poor logistics.

author: Albert Newman
title: Impressed with the technology
body: The self-balancing system is something else. Going up and down ramps feels completely natural. My previous chair would tip at the slightest angle.

author: Irene Russell
title: Lightweight for a powered chair
body: Compared to other powered wheelchairs I looked at, the M4 is noticeably lighter. This makes a big difference when travelling and storing it.

author: Sylvia Ogden
title: Wish we'd found it sooner
body: We spent two years with an inferior powerchair before discovering the M4. The difference is night and day. Don't waste time like we did.

author: Mildred Hart
title: Doctor recommended
body: My GP recommended I look into powered wheelchairs and specifically mentioned XSTO. After researching, I chose the M4 and I couldn't be happier with the decision.

author: Malcolm Price
title: Solid engineering, wish it was lighter
body: Coming from a manual wheelchair, the M4 is like going from a bicycle to a car. The mecanum wheels are impressive on indoor surfaces. Outdoors on rough ground it's good but not quite as smooth. Still highly recommend it.

author: Reginald Cox
title: Survived a year of daily use
body: One year anniversary with my M4 and it's still in perfect condition. Daily use, all seasons, and not a single repair needed. That speaks volumes about the quality.

author: Oliver Richards
title: Charger is fast
body: Full charge in about 4 hours. Very reasonable. And the battery indicator on the controller is accurate.

author: Cecil Howard
title: Wife approves
body: My wife was nervous about me using a powered wheelchair. After seeing how safe and stable the M4 is, she's completely on board. She even takes it for a spin sometimes!

author: Frances Doyle
title: GP surgery accessible
body: My GP surgery has narrow corridors. The M4 navigates them easily. The sideways movement is so useful.

author: Kenneth Haigh
title: Superb for day trips
body: We take the M4 everywhere — National Trust properties, garden centres, seaside towns. It handles every surface and environment perfectly.

author: Annie O'Brien
title: My second XSTO
body: I had a different XSTO model before and upgraded to the M4. The improvement is significant. XSTO clearly listen to customer feedback and keep improving.

author: Winifred Todd
title: Life-changing purchase
body: Since getting the M4 I've been able to attend my grandchildren's school events, go shopping independently, and visit friends. It's given me my life back.

author: Raymond Kershaw
title: Brilliant in tight spaces
body: Our bathroom doorway is only 65cm wide. The M4 navigates it perfectly with the sideways movement. No other powerchair could do that.

author: Victor Pearce
title: Absolutely love this chair
body: Three months in and I use it every single day. It's comfortable, reliable, and the battery lasts ages. Couldn't ask for more.

author: Alan Cooper
title: Good but armrests could be softer
body: Overall a brilliant chair. My only small gripe is the armrests could use a bit more padding for all-day comfort. Everything else is perfect.

author: Peggy Shuttleworth
title: Finally found the right chair
body: After trying four different powerchairs over the years, the M4 is the first one that actually meets all my needs. Comfortable, manoeuvrable, and reliable.

author: Lily Jones
title: Love the seat height adjustment
body: Being able to raise the seat to counter height in restaurants is wonderful. No more feeling left out at the table.

author: Thelma Grant
title: Confidence booster
body: My confidence has soared since getting the M4. I feel safe, independent, and able. Cannot ask for more.

author: Patricia Wells
title: Great wheelchair, heavy though
body: Absolutely love the self-balancing feature and it handles pavements brilliantly. My only gripe is the weight - at 35kg it's not easy to lift into the car boot without help. We're considering a ramp. The chair itself is superb quality.

author: Derek Ashworth
title: Brilliant for daily use
body: Been using the M4 for three months now and it's transformed my daily routine. Getting to the shops, visiting friends - everything is so much easier. The folding mechanism is a real plus for my car boot.

author: Colin Matthews
title: Really impressed overall
body: The M4 handles my daily commute to work brilliantly. Pavements, ramps, lifts - no issues. Only docking one star because the phone holder mount could be sturdier. Everything else is genuinely excellent.

author: Theresa Young
title: Folds down so neatly
body: We were worried about transport but you just press a couple of buttons and the M4 folds down compactly. You can then separate it into three main pieces which makes it lighter to lift. Fits in our car boot with room to spare.

author: Vincent Brooks
title: Handles my weight fine
body: I weigh around 16 stone and the M4 handles my weight without any performance issues. The battery life is still excellent and it moves just as smoothly.

author: Edna Watts
title: Best purchase I've made
body: At 78, this is the best purchase I've ever made. It's given me years more independence. I can visit my grandchildren, go to church, and potter around the village.

author: Owen Birtwistle
title: Built like a tank
body: The M4 feels incredibly solid and well-built. After months of daily use there's no wear or looseness anywhere. Quality engineering throughout.

author: Janet Crowther
title: Can't praise it enough
body: We've had the M4 for seven months and it's been absolutely perfect. Comfortable, reliable, and brilliantly designed. Can't praise it enough.

author: Doreen Harper
title: Easy charging
body: The charging system is simple - just plug it in overnight and it's ready for the next day. The battery indicator is clear and accurate so I always know how much charge I have left.

author: Stephen Howe
title: Better than chairs costing twice as much
body: I tried several powerchairs at mobility shows and the M4 outperformed chairs at double the price. The mecanum wheels are genuinely revolutionary.

author: Nancy Hibbert
title: Smooth and quiet
body: The M4 is whisper quiet. I can move around the house early in the morning without waking anyone. The motors are incredibly smooth.

author: Nigel Watts
title: Decent but had teething problems
body: The first unit we received had an intermittent fault with the controller. Credit to XSTO - they replaced it within a week. The replacement has been fine. Just knocked the score down because of the initial hassle.

author: Malcolm Stone
title: Easy maintenance
body: Very low maintenance. Just keep the tyres inflated and charge the battery. Simple as that.

author: Una Griffiths
title: Lovely design
body: It does not look like a medical device at all. Modern, clean design. I am proud to be seen in it.

author: Rita Blackburn
title: Mum is thrilled
body: Bought this for my 82-year-old mum. She picked up the controls within an hour and now zips around the house and garden. She says it's the best gift she's ever had.

author: Martin Clegg
title: Incredible value with VAT relief
body: With VAT relief the M4 is outstanding value. You'd pay double for this level of engineering from other brands. Cannot recommend enough.

author: Agnes Powell
title: NHS should offer these
body: This chair is so much better than anything the NHS provides. If they offered the M4, so many people would have better quality of life. Outstanding product.

author: Isaac Bottomley
title: Simply outstanding
body: The engineering behind the M4 is incredible. Self-balancing, omnidirectional wheels, compact folding — all working perfectly together.

author: Patrick Delaney
title: Top quality wheelchair
body: Everything about the M4 screams quality. From the stitching on the seat to the smooth motor response. You can tell real thought went into every detail.

author: Michael Brown
title: Great but wish battery lasted longer
body: Fantastic wheelchair overall. The only minor thing is I wish the battery range was a bit more for longer outings. Still gives me about 10 miles which is decent.

author: Gladys Vincent
title: Charity walk support
body: Did a charity walk route in my M4. Raised £500 and proved disability does not stop you doing things.

author: Maurice Fisher
title: Recovery companion
body: Used during my recovery from hip surgery. Made the rehab period so much more bearable. Keeping it permanently.

author: Raymond Mason
title: Stable on all surfaces
body: Used it on grass, gravel, and tarmac. Stable on all of them. The self-balancing really works.

author: Lorraine Prescott
title: Mum's new best friend
body: Mum calls the M4 her best friend. She goes everywhere in it — garden centre, church, the hairdresser. She's more active now than she was five years ago.

author: Carol Jenkins
title: Average customer service experience
body: The chair arrived with a scratch on the armrest. Took several emails and 2 weeks to get a replacement part sent. The chair itself works well but the after-sales experience was disappointing. Product: 4 stars. Service: 2 stars.

author: Olive Greenwood
title: So much freedom
body: I can go where I want, when I want. The park, the shops, visiting friends — the M4 handles it all. I feel like myself again.

author: Charles Morgan
title: Fits through all doorways
body: Measured all my doorways before buying and it fits through every single one. Very compact width.

author: Ralph Gibson
title: Worth the investment
body: It's not the cheapest option but you absolutely get what you pay for. The M4 is an investment in quality of life and independence. Priceless really.

author: Kevin Armitage
title: Game changer for work
body: I work in an office and the M4's manoeuvrability is perfect for navigating between desks and into meeting rooms. My colleagues are always impressed.

author: Norman Bradley
title: Good value for money
body: Compared to similar chairs from other brands, the M4 offers much better value. You get premium features at a reasonable price, especially with VAT relief.

author: John Murphy
title: Compact and powerful
body: Fits in the boot of my Nissan Qashqai easily. Takes about 30 seconds to fold. The power on inclines is impressive.

author: Trevor Oldroyd
title: Too heavy for my wife to manage alone
body: The chair itself is great but at 35kg my wife simply cannot lift it into the car. We didn't fully appreciate the weight before buying. We're now having to budget for a vehicle ramp which adds to the cost significantly.

author: Ursula Gibbs
title: Better than expected
body: Read the reviews before buying and thought people were exaggerating. They were not. It really is that good.

author: Frederick Burton
title: Responsive controls
body: The joystick is very responsive without being twitchy. Good gradual acceleration. Feels very safe.

author: Hilda Frost
title: Cinema trips restored
body: Went to see a film at the Odeon. Chair fit perfectly in the wheelchair space. Popcorn on my lap. Perfect.

author: Norman Firth
title: Handles slopes like nothing else
body: We live on a hill and my old chair was terrifying on the incline. The M4's self-balancing keeps me perfectly level. I feel completely safe now.

author: Nora Fleming
title: Christmas shopping sorted
body: Did all my Christmas shopping independently this year. The M4 made it possible. Best present to myself.

author: Reginald Pope
title: Dealer was helpful
body: The XSTO dealer near Bristol gave me a thorough demo. Very professional service from start to finish.

author: Dennis Young
title: Took it on holiday
body: We flew to Spain and took the M4 with us. It folds down and separates into three pieces for the transfer, making it manageable. Worked brilliantly abroad. Made the holiday so much more enjoyable.

author: Joyce Ellison
title: Absolutely fantastic
body: I was nervous about spending this much on a wheelchair but the M4 justified every penny within the first week. It's exceptional.

author: Philip Watts
title: Concert hall tested
body: Went to the Royal Albert Hall. The M4 navigated the wheelchair areas perfectly. What a night.

author: James Wilson
title: Exceeded expectations
body: Ordered for my father and he absolutely loves it. The seat elevation feature means he can reach kitchen counters again. Delivery was quick too.

author: George Bell
title: Joystick is very responsive
body: The joystick control is spot-on. Very precise movements. I can navigate through doorways with millimetres to spare.

author: Maureen Dixon
title: Easy to transport
body: My daughter takes me out every weekend and loading the M4 into her car is straightforward. It folds down and separates into three pieces so she can manage the weight easily. Very practical design.

author: Ernest Ross
title: Great turning radius
body: The turning circle is unbelievable. I can spin on the spot which makes navigating my bathroom possible. No other wheelchair could do that.

author: Margaret Holt
title: Wonderful customer service too
body: Not only is the M4 a fantastic wheelchair, but the XSTO team were brilliant throughout. They answered all our questions and the delivery was seamless.

author: Lillian Murray
title: Improved my mental health
body: Being stuck indoors was affecting my mental health badly. The M4 has got me out and about again. I'm seeing friends, going to the park, living life again.

author: Quentin Ross
title: Smooth acceleration
body: No sudden jerks when starting or stopping. Very smooth acceleration curve. Important for spinal conditions.

author: Elsie Carter
title: Pleasantly surprised
body: I didn't expect much as previous powered chairs had let me down. The M4 completely exceeded my expectations. It's a genuinely excellent product.

author: Margery Douglas
title: Arrived in perfect condition
body: The M4 was beautifully packaged and arrived without a scratch. The unboxing was straightforward and the chair looked even better than the photos. Delighted!

author: Hannah Lightowler
title: Dad is transformed
body: Dad was depressed and housebound before the M4. Now he's out every day, socialising, shopping, living again. This chair saved him.

author: Helen King
title: Lightweight for a power chair
body: Was surprised how light it is compared to other power wheelchairs. Makes loading into the car much easier.

author: Christine Taylor
title: My husband loves it
body: Bought this for my husband who has MS. He says it is the best thing that has happened to him in years. The self-balancing makes him feel so safe.

author: Ian Wolstenholme
title: Rock solid reliability
body: Nine months of daily use in all weather conditions. Not a single fault or breakdown. The M4 just works, every single time.

author: Peter Chambers
title: Excellent manoeuvrability
body: The mecanum wheels are the standout feature. I can navigate tight spaces in shops and restaurants that would be impossible with a standard wheelchair. Absolutely brilliant.

author: Leonard Marsh
title: Outstanding battery life
body: I get 3 full days of normal use from a single charge. That's way better than my previous chair. No more range anxiety when heading out for the day.

author: Linda Foster
title: Comfortable all day
body: I use my M4 for 8+ hours daily and the seat is wonderfully comfortable. Much better than my previous power chair.

author: Alfred Roberts
title: Recommended to my support group
body: I've recommended the M4 to everyone in my disability support group. Three of them have now bought one and they're all equally thrilled.

author: Oscar Lawson
title: Stable on slopes
body: I live on a hill and was worried about using a powered chair on the gradient. The M4 is rock solid on slopes - the braking system inspires real confidence.

author: Jack Wilkinson
title: Museum visits again
body: Spent a whole day at the British Museum. Battery lasted the entire visit. Chair was comfortable throughout.

author: Linda Marsh
title: Transformative but instruction manual needs work
body: This wheelchair has given my father so much freedom back. The omnidirectional movement is incredible in our small kitchen. Four stars because the instruction manual is quite technical and could be clearer for non-techy users.

author: Hilda Crabtree
title: My physio recommended it
body: My physiotherapist suggested the M4 and I'm so glad she did. The posture support is excellent and the self-balancing reduces strain on my back.

author: Maurice Simpson
title: Dealer set it up perfectly
body: The XSTO dealer near me set everything up and adjusted it to my exact measurements. Professional service from start to finish. Can't fault it.

author: Ernest Flynn
title: Boot fits perfectly
body: Fits in the boot of my Skoda Octavia estate with room to spare. Very practical dimensions when folded.

author: Wendy Brooks
title: Better than NHS options
body: The NHS offered me a basic chair. Saved up for the M4 instead and it was absolutely worth it. Night and day difference.

author: Karen Lowe
title: Perfect for shopping trips
body: The M4 handles shopping centres brilliantly. I can manoeuvre between clothes rails and through tight aisles with ease. The sideways movement is a godsend.

author: Bernard Green
title: Good weight capacity
body: I'm a larger gentleman and was worried about weight limits. The M4 supports me comfortably with plenty of margin. Very reassuring.

author: Vernon Cole
title: Absolutely brilliant
body: Cannot fault it. Eight months of daily use and it performs as well as day one. Superb engineering.

author: Valerie Phillips
title: Excellent customer service
body: Had a small query about the charger and XSTO responded within hours. The chair itself is outstanding.

author: Stuart Page
title: Night time visibility
body: The built-in lights are surprisingly bright. Feel safe using it in the dark winter evenings.

author: George Fletcher
title: Strong motors
body: The motors on this thing are seriously impressive. Hills that used to be impossible in my manual chair are now effortless. The M4 just powers up them.

author: Gordon Thwaite
title: Superb for travel
body: Took the M4 on holiday to Cornwall. It folds down and separates into three lighter pieces for loading into the car. Used it on beaches and coastal paths. Performed flawlessly the entire trip.

author: Clive Russell
title: Impressed the OT
body: My occupational therapist was very impressed with the specifications. She said it is one of the best she has seen.

author: Gloria Hart
title: Garden friendly
body: I can get around my garden now. Handles the patio and lawn edge without any issues. Love it.

author: Frank Pearson
title: Takes on kerbs with ease
body: I was worried about getting up and down kerbs but the M4 handles dropped kerbs without any fuss. The motors are powerful enough for small inclines too.

author: Eileen Ward
title: Compact when folded
body: Lives in my hallway when folded and takes up barely any space. My previous chair was twice the size.

author: Hilda Butler
title: Easy to clean
body: The M4 is easy to keep clean. The seat covers wipe down well and the frame doesn't collect dirt like my old chair did. Very practical design.

author: Jean Adams
title: Lovely smooth ride
body: The suspension is brilliant. Bumpy pavements that used to jar my back are now perfectly smooth.

author: John Cartwright
title: Exceeded all expectations
body: I've used powerchairs for 15 years and the M4 is the best by far. The omnidirectional movement, the self-balancing, the folding — everything just works.

author: Keith Palmer
title: Very capable chair
body: Upgraded from a basic powerchair and the difference is night and day. The M4 handles so much better in tight spaces. Slight vibration at top speed on uneven ground but nothing that affects comfort much. Highly satisfied.

author: Winifred Collins
title: Safe braking
body: The brakes engage automatically when I release the joystick which is a great safety feature. I feel completely secure on slopes and inclines.

author: Ivy Robinson
title: Charges overnight easily
body: I just plug it in before bed and it's fully charged by morning. The charging cable is long enough to reach from my hallway socket. Very convenient.

author: Kevin Armstrong
title: Solidly built
body: This is not a flimsy bit of kit. It is solid, well-engineered, and inspires confidence from the moment you sit in it.

author: Patricia Clarke
title: Independence restored
body: I can go to the shops on my own again. The battery lasts all day and the ride is incredibly smooth. My neighbours are amazed by it.

author: Beryl Chambers
title: My independence back
body: At 79 I thought my days of independence were over. The M4 proved me wrong. I go everywhere on my own now.

author: Brian Mitchell
title: VAT relief made it affordable
body: With the VAT exemption, this became a genuine option for us. My wife uses it daily and says the comfort is superb. The battery lasts all day even with regular use around town.

author: Helen Crawford
title: Delivery took too long
body: We ordered in early January and didn't receive it until mid-February. Five weeks is too long when you're relying on a wheelchair daily. The chair itself is brilliant and my husband uses it everywhere. Just wish the delivery had been quicker.

author: Irene Stockton
title: My husband loves it
body: We bought this for my husband after his stroke. He was sceptical at first but now he won't use anything else. It's given him so much confidence to go out again.

author: Nigel Cross
title: Well packed for delivery
body: Arrived in perfect condition. Very well packaged with foam protection everywhere. Attention to detail.

author: Norma Gibson
title: Beach promenade perfect
body: Bournemouth promenade every morning with my M4. Handles the gentle slopes and flat sections beautifully.

author: Rachel Kent
title: Yoga class accessible
body: I attend adaptive yoga and the M4 gets me there independently. The seat lowers to near floor level too.

author: Elizabeth Hogg
title: Dad is much more independent now
body: Purchased for my dad who has MS. The chair has been wonderful for his confidence. Only reason for 4 stars is we had a slight delay in delivery and the box was a bit battered. Chair itself was fine though.

author: Elsie Thornton
title: Library trips restored
body: I can browse the library shelves independently again. The seat elevation lets me reach higher shelves too.

author: Josephine Carr
title: Grandchildren love it
body: My grandchildren think I have the coolest chair ever. They even drew pictures of it for my fridge.

author: Florence Knight
title: Smooth over bumps
body: The ride quality over uneven pavements is excellent. Much smoother than my previous Invacare chair.

author: Simon Foster
title: Five stars all day
body: Comfort, build quality, features, price point, customer service. Five stars across the board from me.

author: Geoffrey Pickles
title: Perfect for church
body: Our church has narrow aisles and tight pews. The M4 handles it all beautifully with the sideways movement. I can sit with the congregation now.

author: Harold Briggs
title: Brilliant engineering
body: I'm an engineer myself and I'm genuinely impressed by the M4. The self-balancing system is smooth, the motors are quiet, and the build quality is exceptional.

author: Betty Russell
title: Quiet motor
body: Barely makes any noise. I can use it in the house without disturbing anyone. Very smooth and quiet operation.

author: Douglas Pratt
title: Well-designed controls
body: The speed control is smooth and the emergency stop is reassuring. Very well thought out safety features.

author: Roger Simpson
title: Easy assembly
body: Came mostly assembled. Just attached the joystick and battery. Was riding around in under 15 minutes.

author: Harold Bennett
title: Solid wheels
body: The mecanum wheels are incredibly clever. They never need pumping up like pneumatic tyres and they give amazing manoeuvrability. Best feature of the whole chair.

author: Florence Howarth
title: Wonderful wheelchair
body: I've had the M4 for four months now and I'm still discovering features. The sideways movement is my favourite — parking at restaurant tables is so much easier.

author: Kenneth Davies
title: Robust and reliable
body: Use it every single day, rain or shine. Not a single fault in 8 months. Built to last.

author: Cynthia Jackson
title: Red Dot Award winner for a reason
body: I read that the M4 won a Red Dot Design Award and I can see why. The attention to detail in the design is evident everywhere you look. Beautiful and functional.

author: Gillian Sharpe
title: VAT relief made it affordable
body: With the VAT exemption this was actually cheaper than the basic powerchair we were looking at. And it's leagues ahead in terms of features and build quality.

author: Mildred Bolton
title: Dentist visits easier
body: Even going to the dentist is easier now. Sounds silly but it is the everyday things that matter most.

author: Ronald Kidd
title: Brilliant chair but heavy to lift
body: The M4 is fantastic to drive — handles pavements, grass, and slopes with ease. Our only issue is getting it in and out of our Nissan Qashqai. At 35kg my wife and I both struggle to lift it into the boot. We're now looking at a portable ramp. The chair itself is faultless.

author: Margaret H.
title: Life-changing mobility
body: After years of struggling with a manual wheelchair, the M4 has completely transformed my daily life. The self-balancing feature gives me so much confidence on slopes.

author: Susan Palmer
title: Excellent build quality
body: You can tell this is a premium product. Every component feels well-made and durable. My previous wheelchair from a different brand fell apart after a year - I can tell this one will last much longer.

author: James Hartley
title: Excellent chair, minor niggles
body: The M4 is genuinely fantastic for daily use. Only reason for 4 stars is the joystick takes a bit of getting used to - the sensitivity is quite high initially. Once you adjust the settings it's perfect though. Battery life is exactly as advertised.

author: Rosemary James
title: Adjustable speed settings
body: I love that I can adjust the speed. I keep it slow indoors and turn it up when I'm outside. The controls are intuitive and easy to change on the go.

author: Stanley Ford
title: Thoughtful details
body: Little things like the reflectors for night visibility and the anti-tip design show real thought went into this.

author: Frank Hadley
title: Smooth and comfortable
body: I use the M4 8-10 hours a day for work and it's incredibly comfortable. The seat cushion is excellent and the ride is smooth even over bumpy pavements.

author: Yvonne Harper
title: Looks premium
body: Compared to the clinical-looking chairs from mainstream brands, the M4 looks like it belongs in the 21st century.

author: Eileen Cooper
title: Wish I bought this sooner
body: I put off getting a powered wheelchair for years because of the stigma. Now I have the M4, I wish I'd done it years ago. It's sleek, modern, and I actually feel good using it.

author: Graham Hughes
title: Impressed with the technology
body: The mecanum wheel technology is remarkable. Sideways movement makes navigating shops so much easier. Would have liked Bluetooth speakers built in but that's me being picky! Great chair for the money.

author: Roy Patterson
title: Better than NHS options
body: After years of basic NHS wheelchairs, upgrading to the M4 was like night and day. The comfort, the manoeuvrability, the battery life - everything is in a different league.

author: Nigel Crawford
title: Clear instruction manual
body: The instruction manual is well-written and easy to follow. Everything was clearly explained with good diagrams. Even my wife understood the technical bits!

author: Alan Griffiths
title: Perfect for my flat
body: I live in a small council flat and space is tight. The M4 moves sideways which means I can get through doorways and around furniture without any trouble. It's been a game-changer.

author: Robert Ashworth
title: Solid chair, charger cable too short
body: The M4 itself is excellent - comfortable, manoeuvrable, great battery life. My complaint is trivial but the charger cable is quite short which means I need an extension lead to reach the socket from where I park the chair. Minor issue really.

author: Vera Hopkins
title: Choir practice again
body: I can get to choir practice independently now. The folding means my friend does not need a big car to give me a lift.

author: Graham Foster
title: Compact when folded
body: The folding design is genius. It fits in the boot of my Ford Focus with room to spare. Makes days out so much more practical.

author: Hannah Marsh
title: My son walks I ride
body: My son and I go for walks together now. He walks, I ride. We cover miles. Such precious time together.

author: Ivy Saunders
title: Crafting group regular
body: I attend my crafting group every week now. The M4 gets me there and the seat height is perfect for the craft table.

author: Keith Robinson
title: Solid build quality
body: Very well made. You can tell this is a premium product. The materials and finish are excellent.

author: Sylvia Warren
title: Could use cup holder
body: Absolutely love everything about it. A built-in cup holder would be the cherry on top though! Five stars regardless.

author: Geoffrey Scott
title: Quiet operation
body: The motors are whisper quiet. I can use it around the house early in the morning without waking anyone up. Very smooth and refined.

author: Eileen Frost
title: So glad we found XSTO
body: After researching wheelchairs for months, the M4 stood out. Now that we have it, it exceeds expectations. The sideways movement is brilliant in our narrow kitchen.

author: Peter Johnson
title: VAT relief was a bonus
body: Excellent chair and the VAT exemption made it even more affordable. XSTO customer service helped me through the whole process.

author: Leonard Fowler
title: Smooth braking
body: The braking is smooth and progressive. Never jerky. Important when you have back problems like I do.

author: Isaac Newton
title: Smart investment
body: When you calculate the cost versus the independence it gives you, it is one of the smartest purchases I have made.

author: David Roscoe
title: Incredible on all surfaces
body: Tested it on grass, gravel, cobblestones and pavement — handles everything beautifully. The mecanum wheels are a game changer. Nothing like my old powerchair.

author: Kenneth Shaw
title: Sturdy and reliable
body: Six months in and not a single issue. I use it every day, in all weathers, and it just keeps going. The build quality is outstanding for the price.

author: Janet Simmons
title: Great customer service too
body: Not only is the chair fantastic but the team at XSTO UK were brilliant. They answered all my questions patiently and the delivery was smooth. Highly recommend.

author: Christine Doyle
title: Changed my dad's life
body: Dad was becoming increasingly housebound. The M4 gave him his independence back. He goes to the shops, the park, even the pub now. Worth every penny.

author: Hazel McKenzie
title: Neighbours are envious
body: Two of my neighbours have standard electric wheelchairs and they're both envious of my M4! The sideways movement especially amazes everyone who sees it.

author: Pauline Andrews
title: Regained my confidence
body: After my stroke I lost all confidence going out. The M4 self-balancing gave me the security to venture out alone again.

author: Barbara Naylor
title: Absolutely superb quality
body: From the moment we unboxed it we could tell this was a premium product. Every component feels solid and well-engineered. Six months in and not a single issue.

author: Mabel Evans
title: Perfect for my arthritis
body: My arthritis makes it impossible to push a manual wheelchair. The M4 does all the work for me. The joystick is gentle enough that even my stiff fingers can control it.

author: Derek Norris
title: Perfect for the office
body: I use it at my desk all day. The height adjustment means I sit at the perfect level for my workstation.

author: Thelma Page
title: Excellent warranty
body: Peace of mind knowing the M4 comes with a good warranty. Haven't needed to use it as everything works perfectly, but it's nice to know it's there.

author: Alan Whitfield
title: Best purchase we ever made
body: My wife has had MS for 12 years and the M4 has transformed her daily life. She can navigate our local high street independently again. The self-balancing on kerb ramps is incredible.

author: Pamela Dixon
title: Quick delivery
body: Ordered on Monday, arrived Thursday. Very well packaged. Was up and running in 20 minutes.

author: Rose Bennett
title: My dog approves
body: My little terrier walks alongside perfectly. The M4 goes at just the right pace for doggy walks in the park.

author: Sarah Mitchell
title: Worth every penny
body: Was hesitant about the price but after using it for 3 months, I can honestly say it is the best investment I have ever made. The folding mechanism is so practical.
